summary: ANDROID | Falcon Grey | EQ settings not saved for Custom
scenario: Custom EQ settings are not persisted after saving and reopening the EQ settings page on Falcon Grey (Android).
description_clean: On Falcon Grey (Android), custom EQ settings are not saved after clicking Save and reopening the EQ settings page.
steps: Open Falcon Grey on Android device
Adjust EQ settings to custom values
expected: Custom EQ settings should be saved and displayed after reopening the EQ settings page
actual: Custom EQ settings are not saved after reopening the EQ settings page
